name: ccbot-discord-bridge
description: Standalone Discord voice bridge for the auto-injector: wake-word voice control of manager terminal 999 from a Discord voice channel, with session-key linking and full system-audio playback.

scripts.check: for f in config.js src/*.js tools/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done; echo 'all node --check OK'

comment: VERSION PINS ARE LOAD-BEARING: @discordjs/voice MUST be >=0.19.2 — that release (PR #11449) fixes the DAVE voice-RECEIVE bug (RFC3550 padding); 0.19.0/0.19.1 capture broken audio under mandatory DAVE E2EE. @snazzah/davey auto-installs as a hard dep of voice; pinned here for clarity.
